title: Briful 4 PCS 12" Glitter Poinsettia Brown Artificial Flowers Stem for Christmas Tree Decorations Fake Poinsettia Flowers Large Artificial Christmas Flowers Arrangements for Xmas Decorations
features: 【Premium Poinsettia Artificial Flowers】The artificial poinsettia flower in brown protrudes from the Christmas decorations as a stem flower with large blossom. The poinsettia is modeled realistically with great attention to detail and feels nice and velvety when touched. Each petal in different size, and 5 glitering berries set on the top. Brown artificial flowers with long stem which can be bent, pinned or shortened.

【Christmas Decorations Indoor】Large poinsettia christmas decorations will be an eye-catcher in winter. Depending on the ambience, the classic Xmas flowers look playful, modern or traditional. Let your creativity run wild and bring Christmas shine into your room with our poinsettia.

【Artificial Poinsettia Plants Size】Our artificial poinsettia as a long stem flower with a total of 4 stunning Christmas flowers. The poinsettia, glittering and velvety flowers, sit on a high-quality brown bendable stem and is about 18-inch long. The beautiful large flower head is about 12-inch in diameter.

【Eye-catching Poinsettia Arrangements】The decorative poinsettia flower adorns the table, the windowsill or the chest of drawers very well, for example, by putting the poinsettia in a tall vase and filling it with artificial greenery. Whether at home, at an event or as decoration in business premises, or at the reception of a company.

【Sparkling Large Christmas Flowers】Create a Christmas bouquet in bright colours with the poinsettia artificial flowers. The Faux flowers are practically indestructible and are therefore ideal as shop window decorations or as flower decorations for a restaurant. But even at home you can create an impressive arrangement or Xmas tree decorations with the artificial poinsettia with glittering berries.
